scripts.test: npm run test:recommendations && npm run test:practice-audio-fallback && npm run test:practice-answer && npm run test:practice-input-flow && npm run test:reveal-shortcut && npm run test:spelling-pattern-hints && npm run test:audio-generation && npm run test:admin-audio-queue-bulk
scripts.test:recommendations: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /private/tmp/spelio-tests --noEmit false tests/recommendations.test.ts && node /private/tmp/spelio-tests/tests/recommendations.test.js
scripts.test:practice-audio-fallback: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /private/tmp/spelio-tests --noEmit false tests/practiceAudioFallback.test.ts && node /private/tmp/spelio-tests/tests/practiceAudioFallback.test.js
scripts.test:practice-answer: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /private/tmp/spelio-tests --noEmit false tests/practiceAnswer.test.ts && node /private/tmp/spelio-tests/tests/practiceAnswer.test.js

scripts.test:reveal-shortcut: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /private/tmp/spelio-tests --noEmit false tests/revealShortcut.test.ts && node /private/tmp/spelio-tests/tests/revealShortcut.test.js
scripts.test:spelling-pattern-hints: tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /private/tmp/spelio-tests --noEmit false tests/spellingPatternHints.test.ts && node /private/tmp/spelio-tests/tests/spellingPatternHints.test.js
scripts.test:audio-generation: NODE_PATH=./node_modules tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir /private/tmp/spelio-tests --noEmit false tests/audioGeneration.test.ts && NODE_PATH=./node_modules node /private/tmp/spelio-tests/tests/audioGeneration.test.js
